$comment: Layer B selection cases for INVOICE vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. The conditional STOP RUN in MAIN-PARA means a zero amount prints only INV_ID/STATUS=EMPTY and exits; a candidate that drops the early return bills the empty invoice (extra READY/FEE output, STATUS overwritten) and is caught on every zero case. Cases cover the early-exit path, the billed fall-through path, a half-cent ROUNDED fee, a tiny fee, and the capacity region.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 INVOICE (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-invoice)
